data.body:
=== CLEAN HANDOFF (2026-06-13) ===
PUSHED: origin/main @ 3bdf1897 (all Tier E work + CI fix + handoff doc). Working tree clean.
Full handoff plan committed at docs/tier-e-execution-plan.md (opus-reviewed E0-E9 decomposition + resume point + env + gates + risks).

DONE (green, closed children): E0 argparse CLI+goldens+middleware (knobby-mile-gob, 3a53e20); E1 entrypoint cutover (pelt-twig-taboo, c64c889); E2 read-ish/quality (grubby-logic-hack) = E2.1 field-reads (a3a7eb2), E2.2 exists/resolve/format (ee29e91), E2.3 list-descendants (d81650a), E2.4 gates clarity/check-ac/quality/summary (482bbed). Pre-existing CI fix (dizzy-splice-coven bug, 9760b2b): REPO_ROOT .tickets-tracker leak + macOS tmp-race. Checkpoint full suite 1660 passed/0 failed.

IN-PROCESS NOW: all category-A + get-file-impact, get-verify-commands, exists, resolve, format, list-descendants, clarity-check, check-ac, quality-check, summary. Bash kept as parity-pinned 2nd impl (suites call $DISPATCHER directly; deletion back-loads to E7/E8).

RESUME HERE: E3 write/lifecycle (transition, reopen, claim, compact, compact-all, scratch, delete), COUPLED to E5c (relocate ticket_txn.py into rebar._commands/_store — it does a bare 'import event_append' and can't go on the in-process sys.path without violating the test_engine_dir guard). This touches the single locked write path + exit-10 optimistic-concurrency contract: do the opus-reviewed sub-plan FIRST, then re-run the concurrency matrix (-m integration). Then E4 init/fsck (highest risk), E5/E5b bridge+reconciler (LIVE-DIG JIRA gate — pause for user go-ahead before first live DIG writes), E6 shims, E7 dispatcher, E8 suites->pytest, E9 validation+close.

PATTERN (followed E0-E2): characterize bash arm empirically -> port to rebar.* reusing reducer/graph/_commands/_store/_engine_support -> route argparse in-process + rewire library off _run -> dual-run parity test (rebar._cli.main vs bash dispatcher, byte-for-byte) -> fast gate + live smoke -> commit green + per-command child ticket. NO bash deleted until E7/E8.

ENV: editable build live (pipx install --editable . --force); dev venv /tmp/rebar-dev; always fixed --basetemp; never git stash uncommitted work.
